borrow(uint256,bytes,uint256).details: Caller must send ETH as collateral (msg.value).         The pool validates the credit score via ICreditScoreNFT,         checks collateral sufficiency and (optionally) verifies a ZK         proof before transferring USDC to the borrower.

params.scoreThreshold: Minimum score the caller claims to have; used as                       an early revert hint before the on-chain lookup
params.zkProof: Encoded ZK proof bytes (may be empty if zkVerifier == address(0))

getHealthFactor(uint256).details: Defined as:           healthFactor = collateralValueUSD * 1e18 / (principal + accruedInterest)         A value >= 1e18 means the loan is sufficiently collateralised.         A value <  1e18 means the loan is liquidatable.

params.loanId: The loan identifier to look up

returns._0: The LoanPosition struct for that loan

liquidate(uint256).details: Reverts with HealthFactorTooLow if the loan is still healthy.         The liquidator must supply USDC to cover the outstanding debt.         A 5 % bonus on the collateral is awarded to the liquidator.

params.loanId: The identifier of the loan to liquidate

repay(uint256).details: Caller must have approved the pool to spend at least         principal + accrued interest worth of USDC.         On success the locked ETH collateral is returned to the borrower.

params.loanId: The identifier of the loan to repay

borrow(uint256,bytes,uint256).notice: Open a new collateralised USDC loan

getHealthFactor(uint256).notice: Compute the current health factor for an open loan

getLoan(uint256).notice: Fetch the full loan record for a given loan ID

liquidate(uint256).notice: Seize the collateral of an under-collateralised loan

repay(uint256).notice: Repay an active loan in full (principal + accrued interest)
